description: DATE_TRUNC preserves the timezone type of the input timestamp

columns.name: month_start
columns.note: DATE_TRUNC preserves timezone type of input

name: date_trunc
query_sql:
-- @name DateTruncMonth
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, DATE_TRUNC('month', occurred_at) AS month_start FROM events
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE events (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, occurred_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL);
